title: November 11
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|November|hide31=yes}}

'''November 11''' is the 315th day of the year (316th in leap years). There are 50 days remaining.</noinclude>

*[[1940s#1940|1940]] – [[Roy Conrad]] is born.
*[[1940s#1943|1943]] – [[Dave Cockrum]] is born.
*[[1960s#1964|1964]] – [[Angus Wright]] is born.
*[[1998]] – [[Crimson Empire II: Council of Blood 1|''Crimson Empire II: Council of Blood'' 1]] published.
*[[1999]] – [[Mary Kay Bergman]] dies.
*[[2003]] – "[[Clone Wars Chapter 3]]" airs on [[Cartoon Network]].
*[[2006]] – [[Wikipedia:PlayStation 3|PlayStation 3]] released.
*[[2008]] – ''[[Star Wars: The Clone Wars: Jedi Alliance]]'' released for the [[Wikipedia:Nintendo DS|Nintendo DS]].
*2008 – ''[[Star Wars: The Clone Wars: Lightsaber Duels]]'' released for the [[Wikipedia:Wii|Wii]].
*2008 – ''[[Star Wars: The Clone Wars: Jedi Alliance: Prima Official Game Guide]]'' released.
*2008 – ''[[Star Wars: The Clone Wars: Lightsaber Duels: Prima Official Game Guide]]'' released.
*[[2009]] – ''[[Star Wars: Purge: Seconds to Die]]'' published.
*2009 – [[The Clone Wars 10|''The Clone Wars'' 10]] published.
*[[2011]] – "[[Plan of Dissent]]" airs on Cartoon Network.
*[[2014]] – [[Star Wars: The Clone Wars – The Lost Missions|''Star Wars: The Clone Wars: The Lost Missions'']] released on DVD and Blu-Ray.
*[[2015]] – "[[Wings of the Master]]" airs on [[Disney XD]].
*2015 – [[Chewbacca (2015) 3|''Chewbacca'' (2015) 3]] published.
*[[2016]] – ''[[Star Wars Rebels: Chopper Chase]]'' released.
*[[2018]] – "[[Signal from Sector Six]]" airs on Disney XD.
*[[2020]] – [[Darth Vader (2020) 7|''Darth Vader'' (2020) 7]] published.
*[[2021]] – "[[Charhound (episode)|Charhound]]" airs on the [[StarWarsKids.com|Star Wars Kids]] YouTube channel.
*2021 – "[[Nexu (episode)|Nexu]]" airs on the Star Wars Kids YouTube channel.
*2021 – [[Knights of the Old Republic]] is re-released on the [[Wikipedia:Nintendo Switch|Nintendo Switch]] system.
*[[2025]] – ''[[Master of Evil]]'' published.
*2025 – [[Master of Evil (audiobook)|''Master of Evil'' audiobook]] released.
*2025 – ''[[Path of the Lightsaber Vol. 1]]'' published.
*2025 – ''[[Star Wars: The Force Awakens: The 10th Anniversary Special Edition]]'' published.
